The '''''Juvaini''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]].

Whilst being aided by the ''[[Metternich]]'', the Imperial [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] attacked the [[Maria (MC80 Star Cruiser)|''Maria'']] which was receiving [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighter]] prototypes.

The ''Juvaini'' was near [[Sunaj IV]] en route to a scheduled meeting with the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial I-class]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Relentless (Sunaj IV)|''Relentless'']] when the Nebulon-B was intercepted by [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

Three Rebel B-wings from Blue group then proceeded to destroy the ''Juvaini'' swiftly before the ''Relentless'' could arrive at the scene to assist the doomed escort frigate.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''
